description: Add version-mismatch detection between CLI, MCP server, and extension to prevent stale nested dependency issues. After all stories pass, `opentabs start` displays the MCP server version in its startup banner and warns when CLI/server versions diverge, `opentabs doctor` checks CLI-vs-server version alignment, and the health endpoint exposes enough data for CLI-side version comparison.

userStories.title: Add CLI helper to read the nested MCP server package version
userStories.description: Create a helper function in the CLI that reads the version from the nested @opentabs-dev/mcp-server package.json, so other CLI commands can compare it against the CLI's own version.
acceptanceCriteria: New function resolves the mcp-server package.json path (via import.meta.resolve or monorepo fallback) and returns its version string
Returns null if the package.json cannot be read (graceful degradation)
Function is exported from a shared CLI module (not inlined in a command)
userStories.notes:
Files:
- platform/cli/src/version-info.ts (new file — shared version helpers)

Context:
The CLI already reads its own version in two places:
  1. `platform/cli/src/commands/setup.ts` line 23-27: `getCliVersion()` reads `join(dirname(fileURLToPath(import.meta.url)), '..', '..', 'package.json')`
  2. `platform/cli/src/commands/doctor.ts` line 158: reads `join(cliDir, '..', '..', 'package.json')`

The MCP server entry is resolved via `import.meta.resolve('@opentabs-dev/mcp-server')` in `platform/cli/src/commands/start.ts` line 95. From the resolved entry path, the package.json is at `join(dirname(resolved), '..', 'package.json')` since the entry resolves to `dist/index.js`.

Changes:
Create `platform/cli/src/version-info.ts` with:
  - `getCliVersion(): Promise<string>` — reads CLI's own package.json version (extracted from setup.ts)
  - `getMcpServerVersion(): Promise<string | null>` — resolves `@opentabs-dev/mcp-server/package.json` via `import.meta.resolve('@opentabs-dev/mcp-server/package.json')`, reads and parses it, returns the version string. Falls back to the monorepo relative path (`join(cliDir, '..', '..', '..', 'mcp-server', 'package.json')`). Returns null on any failure.

Constraints:
- Do NOT move or change existing `getCliVersion` in setup.ts yet — that will be updated in US-003 to import from this module
- The monorepo fallback path matches the pattern in `resolveServerEntry()` at start.ts:97-98
- Use `fileURLToPath(import.meta.resolve(...))` pattern, NOT `require.resolve` (ESM project)

userStories.title: Print MCP server version in the startup banner and warn on version mismatch
userStories.description: Modify `opentabs start` to display the MCP server version in its startup header and emit a warning if the CLI and MCP server versions diverge.
acceptanceCriteria: Startup banner includes a line showing the MCP server version (e.g., 'Server version: v0.0.91')
When CLI version differs from MCP server version, a yellow warning is printed suggesting reinstall
When versions match or MCP server version is unreadable, no warning is shown

userStories.title: Add CLI-vs-MCP-server version check to opentabs doctor
userStories.description: Add a new diagnostic check in `opentabs doctor` that compares the CLI version against the nested MCP server package version and warns when they diverge.
acceptanceCriteria: New check labeled 'MCP server version' appears in doctor output
When versions match: pass with 'v0.0.91 (matches CLI)'
When versions differ: warn with both versions and hint to reinstall
When MCP server version is unreadable: warn with hint
